{"command":"Get-Help Register-PnPEntraIDAppForInteractiveLogin -Parameter * | Select-Object Name, Required, Description | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap","explanation":"Check available parameters for the app registration cmdlet","goal":"Understand cmdlet parameters","mode":"sync"}

name                             required description
----                             -------- -----------
ApplicationName                  true     {@{Text=The name of the Entra ID
                                          Application to create.}}
AzureEnvironment                 false    {@{Text=The Azure environment to use
                                          for authentication, the defaults to
                                          'Production' which is the main Azure
                                          environment.}}
DeviceLogin                      false    {@{Text=If specified, a device login
                                          flow, supporting Multi-Factor
                                          Authentication will be used to
                                          authenticate towards the Microsoft
                                          Graph.}}
EntraIDLoginEndPoint             false    {@{Text=Sets the EntraID login
                                          endpoint to be used for creation of
                                          the app. This only works if Azure
                                          Environment parameter is set to
                                          `Custom`}}
GraphApplicationPermissions      false    {@{Text=Specify which Microsoft
                                          Graph Application permissions to
                                          request.}}
GraphDelegatePermissions         false    {@{Text=Specify which Microsoft
                                          Graph Delegate permissions to
                                          request.}}
LogoFilePath                     false    {@{Text=Sets the logo for the Entra
                                          ID application. Provide a full path
                                          to a local image file on your disk
                                          which you want to use as the logo.}}
MicrosoftGraphEndPoint           false    {@{Text=Sets the Microsoft Graph
                                          endpoint to be used for creation of
                                          the app. This only works if Azure
                                          Environment parameter is set to
                                          `Custom`}}
SharePointApplicationPermissions false    {@{Text=Specify which Microsoft
                                          SharePoint Application permissions
                                          to request.}}
SharePointDelegatePermissions    false    {@{Text=Specify which Microsoft
                                          SharePoint Delegate permissions to
                                          request.}}
SignInAudience                   false    {@{Text=Sets the sign in audience.
                                          Use this to make the app support
                                          Single tenant accounts, Multi-tenant
                                          accounts, Multi-tenant + personal
                                          accounts & personal accounts only.}}
Tenant                           true     {@{Text=The identifier of your
                                          tenant, e.g.
                                          mytenant.onmicrosoft.com}}
